ṛddha 1〉 adj. aufgehäuft (von Korn)  AK. 2,9,23 .  VYUTP. 148 . n. aufgehäuftes Korn  MED. dh. 4 . = paripakvamarditadhānya  BHAR. , = bahulitadhānya  SUBHŪTI _zu_ AK.   ŚKDR. 
— 2〉 n. bewiesene Wahrheit  H. an. 2,239 . — Das partic. von ardh s. oben u. ardh.

results.rendered_html:
ṛddha p. p.
1 Prosperous, thriving, rich; ṛddhāpaṇaṃ rājapathaṃ sa paśyan  R. 14. 30 , 85 ; 2. 50 , 5. 40 , 8. 6 ; splendidly furnished; maṃdiraṃ  Ku. 7. 55. 
2 Increased, growing.
3 Stored (as grain).
— ddhaḥ N. of Viṣṇu.
— ddhaṃ
1 Increase, growth.
2 A demonstrated conclusion; distinct result.
